answers.decision_needed: Generate real RTL from SSOT-derived TODOs before compile/lint/audit.
answers.answer: LLM writes the RTL; scripts only derive TODOs, preflight manifests, and validate evidence.
selected: LLM writes the RTL; scripts only derive TODOs, preflight manifests, and validate evidence.
answers.downstream_effect: General-purpose IP generation cannot depend on hardcoded RTL templates.

ssot_projection.generation_flow.blocker_resolution_histo: Record that SSOT is repaired/normalized and rtl-gen remains responsible for real RTL implementation.
ssot_projection.workflow_todos: rtl-gen must read yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml and rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json, implement rtl/<ip>.sv, list/<ip>.f, then rerun /ssot-rtl.
